name: ragbaz-bridge-plugin
description: GraphQL bridge for headless storefronts — events, courses, WooCommerce, and digital downloads via WPGraphQL. Includes built-in headless authentication.

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/ragbaz-bridge && cp ragbaz-bridge.php readme.txt dist/ragbaz-bridge/ && rm -f dist/ragbaz-bridge.zip && cd dist && zip -r ragbaz-bridge.zip ragbaz-bridge/ && cd .. && rm -rf dist/ragbaz-bridge
